note.fr: Suppose que le passif de l'arme donne 80 [[stat:em]].

note.en: Calculated with **reliable stacking, such as with [[character:furina]]**. Without reliable stacking, this weapon performs worse than **[[weapon:flowing-purity]] [R5]**.
note.fr: Calculé avec **un stacking fiable, comme avec [[character:furina]]**. Sans stacking fiable, cette arme performe moins bien que **[[weapon:flowing-purity]] [R5]**.
note.it: La posizione in classifica presuppone accumuli costanti (es. **con [[character:furina]]**). In mancanza di accumuli costanti, quest'arma ha prestazioni peggiori di **[[weapon:flowing-purity]] [R5]**.

note.en: Calculated with **reliable stacking, such as with [[character:furina]]**. Without reliable stacking, this weapon performs worse than **[[weapon:flowing-purity]] [R5]**.
note.fr: Calculé avec **un stacking fiable, comme avec [[character:furina]]**. Sans stacking fiable, cette arme performe moins bien que **[[weapon:flowing-purity]] [R5]**.
note.it: La posizione in classifica presuppone accumuli costanti (es. **con [[character:furina]]**). In mancanza di accumuli costanti, quest'arma ha prestazioni peggiori di **[[weapon:flowing-purity]] [R5]**.

note.en: Calculated with **reliable stacking, such as with [[character:furina]]**. Without reliable stacking, this weapon performs worse than **[[weapon:flowing-purity]] [R5]**.
note.fr: Calculé avec **un stacking fiable, comme avec [[character:furina]]**. Sans stacking fiable, cette arme performe moins bien que **[[weapon:flowing-purity]] [R5]**.
note.it: La posizione in classifica presuppone accumuli costanti (es. **con [[character:furina]]**). In mancanza di accumuli costanti, quest'arma ha prestazioni peggiori di **[[weapon:flowing-purity]] [R5]**.

note.fr: Se classe au même niveau que **[[weapon:a-thousand-floating-dreams]]** si [[character:yanfei]] est **[C4+]**.
note.it: Si classifica similarmente a **[[weapon:a-thousand-floating-dreams]]** se [[character:yanfei]] è **[C4+]**.

note.en: Calculated with [[ability:bol]] cleared. Loses significant value if run **without a consistent healer**.
note.fr: Calculé avec un [[ability:bol]] retiré. Perd significativement en valeur si utilisé **sans un soin constant**.
note.it: La posizione in classifica presuppone che Yanfei riceva abbastanza cure affinché il [[ability:bol]] venga eliminato. **Perde significativamente valore se utilizzata senza buone cure**.

note.en: At **[R5]**, this weapon performs as well as **[[weapon:cashflow-supervision]]**.
note.fr: Une fois **[R5]**, cette arme performe aussi bien que **[[weapon:cashflow-supervision]]**.
note.it: A **[R5]** quest'arma ha prestazioni simili a **[[weapon:cashflow-supervision]]**.

note.en: Calculated with the weapon passive always active. At **[R5]**, this weapon performs as well as **[[weapon:tome-of-the-eternal-flow]]**.
note.fr: Calculé avec le passif de l'arme toujours actif. Une fois **[R5]**, cette arme performe aussi bien que **[[weapon:tome-of-the-eternal-flow]]**.
note.it: Presupponendo che la passiva sia sempre attiva, a **[R5]** quest'arma ha prestazioni simili a **[[weapon:tome-of-the-eternal-flow]]**.
